name: anchorid
description: AnchorID — open-source identity and compliance layer for the Stellar ecosystem.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@anchorid/types && npm run build --workspace=@anchorid/shared && npm run build --workspace=@anchorid/stellar && npm run build --workspace=@anchorid/ui && npm run build --workspace=@anchorid/api && npm run build --workspace=@anchorid/web
